planning_context.selected_plan_summary: Use the included brownfield bundle as the source of truth for a Ralph-backed execution handoff.

execution_rules: Treat the Uigwe bundle as the source of truth.
Execute only the executable leaves included in execution_scope.
Escalate contradictions through the allowed re-entry targets instead of guessing.
output_expectations: Report completed, blocked, or invalidated leaf ids.
List modified files or generated artifacts.

1.label: Run now here
1.description: Continue in the current session by handing this prompt to Ralph immediately.

3.label: Run in another session or terminal
3.description: Use the copyable handoff command later.

next_step_message:
1. Run now here
3. Run in another session or terminal
`$ralph follow docs/sejong/examples/brownfield-decompose-only/ralph-next-step.md`
notes: This is a public example request.
It uses no_commit so installation examples do not imply repository mutation.
handoff_prompt:
# Ralph Execution Handoff

Use `docs/sejong/examples/brownfield-decompose-only` as the source-of-truth Uigwe bundle. Execute only the listed leaves, capture verification evidence, and recommend Uigwe re-entry if the bundle contradicts the target repository.
